errors.description: Repository source cannot be proven from local metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Commercial readiness cannot be claimed for an untrusted source.

errors.description: No license file was found.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Commercial-use rights are ambiguous without a license.

errors.description: License metadata does not clearly indicate commercial-use compatibility.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Human legal review is required before runtime or commercial use.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow requests broad or write-capable permissions.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Workflow privilege expansion must be reviewed before production use.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow uses broad permission syntax instead of explicit least privilege.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Broad workflow permissions can silently grant more authority than required.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow uses read-all instead of explicit scoped read permissions.
errors.fail_closed_reason: read-all hides permission scope and is not acceptable for least-privilege governance.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow uses write-all.
errors.fail_closed_reason: write-all grants broad token authority and is forbidden.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow does not declare explicit permissions.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Implicit default permissions are ambiguous and must be treated as unsafe.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow declares a write scope without a governed justification.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unjustified write scopes can mutate repository state or PR metadata.

errors.description: Workflow permissions use explicit scoped least-privilege declarations.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive audit evidence.

errors.description: Workflow permission scopes are explicit, known, and approved for the workflow context.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; this is positive audit evidence.

errors.description: Workflow structure cannot be deterministically interpreted by the governance parser.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unknown workflow structures must not be trusted for production readiness.

errors.description: Workflow YAML uses unsafe or ambiguous constructs such as anchors, aliases, merge keys, or unsafe permission blocks.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Ambiguous YAML structures can hide permission widening and must fail closed.

errors.description: Workflow capability graph cannot be classified deterministically.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Unknown capabilities require human governance review.

errors.description: Semantic workflow analysis could not produce a trusted parsed workflow object.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Workflow governance cannot rely on regex-only or unavailable parser output.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow uses an unpinned or floating action reference.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Supply-chain lineage is unclear without pinned action versions.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow uses an action reference that is not pinned to a full commit SHA.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Action tags can be retargeted and must not be trusted for production readiness.

errors.description: Secret-like marker was detected in repository metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Potential secret leakage blocks production-readiness claims.

errors.description: Workflow or script metadata references token, secret, bearer, or environment-file material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Secret access paths require human review and redacted evidence only.

errors.description: Environment file is present in the repository tree.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Environment files may contain secrets and require human review.

errors.description: npm install command may execute package lifecycle scripts.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Untrusted npm lifecycle scripts can hijack CI tokens or runtime state.

errors.description: pip install command lacks hash-verified dependency evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Python dependency lineage must be hash-locked before production-readiness claims.

errors.description: Dependency installation path is not sufficiently constrained for governed CI.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Untrusted install behavior can execute attacker-controlled package code.

errors.description: Workflow combines dependency installation, write permissions, and pull-request or workflow-run triggers.
errors.fail_closed_reason: This combination can expose writable GitHub tokens to dependency supply-chain execution.

errors.description: Artifact upload lacks clear hash or attestation evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Generated artifacts require integrity evidence before production readiness.

errors.description: No deterministic test signal was found.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Runtime readiness cannot be claimed without test evidence.

errors.description: No production-readiness guardrail signal was found.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Production-readiness governance is not proven.

errors.description: No audit or evidence lineage signal was found.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Auditability is insufficient for governed commercial use.

errors.description: No runtime parity signal was found.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Source-to-runtime drift cannot be evaluated.

errors.description: Branch protection evidence is missing from local metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Human review is required when branch protection is unknown.

errors.description: Dependency lineage cannot be proven from lockfiles or hash-pinned manifests.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Dependency supply-chain integrity is unclear.

errors.description: One or more non-blocking governance signals require human review.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Commercial readiness claims require human approval.

errors.description: All local metadata signals required by this scanner passed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: No fail-closed reason; human review is still required before commercial claims.
